description:
Create a new SQLite reporting database named 'ChinookReports' at /home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook_reports.db using data from the source Chinook database (/home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook.db). 

The reporting database must contain the following tables:
- 'artist_summary': One row per artist (including those with 0 albums) with columns ArtistId, ArtistName, AlbumCount, TrackCount, TotalDurationMinutes, and AvgTrackDurationSeconds.
- 'genre_revenue': One row per genre with revenue > 0, sorted by TotalRevenue descending. Columns: GenreId, GenreName, TrackCount, TotalRevenue, AvgTrackPrice, and UniqueCustomers.
- 'monthly_sales': One row per month (format 'YYYY-MM'), sorted by YearMonth ascending. Columns: YearMonth, InvoiceCount, TotalRevenue, UniqueCustomers, and AvgInvoiceTotal.

Save the SQL script used to generate these reports to /home/ga/Documents/scripts/create_reports_db.sql.
